clusters.justification: Reflects large-scale salience and limbic network computations that evaluate stimulus valence, orchestrate autonomic arousal, and regulate broad mood states.
Captures the mesolimbic and striato-cortical network computations responsible for assigning utility, predicting reinforcement, and driving goal-directed choice behavior.

Represents the Default Mode Network's core computation of internally directed thought, relying on abstract representations of agents across time to navigate personal history and interpersonal relationships.
